notes: Gamma is a content/presentation generation tool, not a traditional chat AI. Prompt submission automation was challenging due to contenteditable div + React state management. Core architectural findings captured via console and network observation.

console_observations.websocket_error: WebSocket connection to wss://api.gamma.app/graphql failed: WebSocket is closed before the connection is established (intermittent)
console_observations.issues: 5 (1 page error, 3 breaking changes, 1 possible improvement)
console_observations.canvas2d_warning: Canvas2D: Multiple readback operations using getImageData are faster with willReadFrequently attribute set to true

findings.service_type: Content generation (presentations, web pages, documents, social posts, graphics)

warning_design.approach: WebSocket interception required. Cannot use SSE/NDJSON injection. Must either: (1) Intercept WebSocket frames on wss://api.gamma.app/graphql and inject warning GraphQL message, (2) Use DOM overlay/full-page replacement before content renders, or (3) Block the WebSocket upgrade entirely and show a replacement page.
warning_design.notes: Single WebSocket connection carries all traffic. GraphQL protocol adds complexity to frame injection. The generate flow produces presentations/documents, not chat responses, so warning display context is different from chat services.

api_endpoints.name: graphql
api_endpoints.description: Primary API - GraphQL over WebSocket. All AI generation, data queries, and real-time updates flow through this single WebSocket connection.

streaming.behavior: GraphQL subscriptions over WebSocket for real-time content generation. The client connects to wss://api.gamma.app/graphql on page load. AI generation requests and streamed results flow through this WebSocket connection using GraphQL subscription messages.
streaming.note: NOT SSE, NOT NDJSON, NOT polling. Pure WebSocket with GraphQL protocol.

ui_features: Content type selector: Presentation, Web page, Document, Social, Graphic (new)
Settings: Card count (10), Style (Classic), Size (Default), Language (Korean)
Prompt examples with + button to add

chat_input.placeholder: 무엇을 만들지 설명하세요 (Describe what you want to create)
chat_input.notes: No textarea or input elements. Uses contenteditable div with React controlled state. Standard DOM manipulation (textContent) works but React state must also be updated via input event dispatch.

framework.rendering: Client-side React rendering with contenteditable divs for input
framework.description: Next.js-based React SPA with client-side routing

third_party_services.name: LaunchDarkly
third_party_services.description: Feature flags. Stream connection to clientstream.launchdarkly.com

third_party_services.name: Intercom
third_party_services.description: Customer chat support (disabled on generate page)
